PowerShell($body = '{"user_info":{"province":"广东","score":600,"subject_type":"物理","subject_selection":[]},"answers":[{"question_id":1,"selected_option":"A"}]}'; $result = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/assessment/submit" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json; charset=utf-8" -Body \([System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($body\)\) -UseBasicParsing; $result.StatusCode)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $body = '{"user_info":{"province":"广东"},"answers":[{"question_id":1,"selected_option":"A"}]}'; try { $result = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/assessment/submit" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json; charset=utf-8" -Body \([System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($body\)\) -UseBasicParsing; "Status: $\($result.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $body = '{"user_info":{"province":"广东"},"answers":[{"question_id":1,"selected_option":"A"}]}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/assessment/submit" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json; charset=utf-8" -Body \([System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($body\)\) -UseBasicParsing; "OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\) - $\($_.ErrorDetails.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/" -UseBasicParsing; $r.Content } catch { "Error: $\($_.ErrorDetails.Message\)" }; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/docs" -UseBasicParsing; "docs OK: $\($r2.StatusCode\)" } catch { "docs error: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/openapi.json" -UseBasicParsing; $content = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $userInfo = $content.components.schemas.UserInfo | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5; Write-Output $userInfo } catch { "Error: $\($_.ErrorDetails.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/assessment/questions" -UseBasicParsing; "OK: questions count=$\(\($r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).total\)" } catch { "Error: $\($_.ErrorDetails.Message\)" })
PowerShell(python -c "import pydantic; print\(pydantic.__version__\); from models.schemas import UserInfo; print\([f'{n}:req={f.is_required\(\)}' for n,f in UserInfo.model_fields.items\(\)]\)")
PowerShell(python -c "import fastapi; print\('fastapi:', fastapi.__version__\); import starlette; print\('starlette:', starlette.__version__\)")

PowerShell($answers = \(1..40 | ForEach-Object { "{`"question_id`":$_,`"selected_option`":`"A`"}" }\) -join ","; $body = "{`"user_info`":{`"province`":`"广东`"},`"answers`":[$answers]}"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/assessment/submit" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json; charset=utf-8" -Body \([System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($body\)\) -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "FAIL $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\): $\($_.ErrorDetails.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; "Backend UP: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Backend DOWN: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($answers = \(1..40 | ForEach-Object { "{`"question_id`":$_,`"selected_option`":`"A`"}" }\) -join ","; $body = "{`"user_info`":{`"province`":`"广东`"},`"answers`":[$answers]}"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/assessment/submit" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json; charset=utf-8" -Body \([System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($body\)\) -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; "OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "FAIL $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\): $\($_.ErrorDetails.Message.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(300,$_.ErrorDetails.Message.Length\)\)\)" })
